---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to documentation, guides, or examples
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

What documentation needs improvement?

- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect documentation
- [ ] Unclear documentation
- [ ] Outdated documentation
- [ ] Needs more examples
- [ ] Needs better organization
- [ ] Other: _____________

## Affected Documentation

Which documentation is affected?

- [ ] Main README.md
- [ ] Protocol specification (specs/opensignals-v0.1.md)
- [ ] Terminology (specs/terminology.md)
- [ ] Conformance requirements (specs/conformance.md)
- [ ] Architecture documentation (docs/architecture.md)
- [ ] Integration guides (integrations/)
- [ ] Examples (examples/)
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Reference implementation docs
- [ ] Contributing guidelines
- [ ] Other: _____________

## Specific File / Section

If applicable, reference the specific file and section:

- **File**: path/to/file.md
- **Section**: Section heading or line numbers
- **Current content**: Quote the current content

## Problem Description

Describe the documentation problem clearly:

### What's Wrong?

Explain what's incorrect, missing, or unclear.

### Why Is This a Problem?

How does this affect users trying to understand or use OpenSignals?

### Who Is Affected?

- [ ] New users / beginners
- [ ] Implementers (developers)
- [ ] Signal providers
- [ ] Buyers / agencies
- [ ] Governance systems
- [ ] All users

## Proposed Solution

How should the documentation be improved?

### Proposed Content

If you have specific text or examples to suggest, include them here:

```markdown
# Proposed documentation content

Your suggested documentation text here.
```

### Alternative Approaches

Are there alternative ways to address this?

## Additional Examples

Should this documentation include additional examples?

- [ ] Yes, needs code examples
- [ ] Yes, needs JSON schema examples
- [ ] Yes, needs workflow diagrams
- [ ] Yes, needs use case scenarios
- [ ] No, explanation is sufficient

### Suggested Examples

If examples are needed, describe or provide them:

```json
{
  "example": "here"
}
```

## Related Documentation

Link to related documentation that should be consistent or cross-referenced:

- Related section: _____________
- Related file: _____________
- External documentation: _____________

## Search Keywords

What keywords or phrases should users be able to search for to find this documentation?

- Keyword 1
- Keyword 2
- Keyword 3

## User Story

From the perspective of a user:

> As a [type of user], I want [documentation improvement] so that [benefit].

Example:
> As a signal provider, I want clear examples of provenance documentation so that I can properly describe my data sources.

## Impact

How important is this documentation improvement?

- [ ] Critical - Blocks understanding of key concepts
- [ ] High - Significantly improves clarity
- [ ] Medium - Helpful enhancement
- [ ] Low - Minor clarification

## Quick Win?

Is this a quick documentation fix that could be addressed easily?

- [ ] Yes, simple typo or formatting fix
- [ ] Yes, small clarification needed
- [ ] No, requires significant rewriting
- [ ] No, requires new content creation

## Contribution Offer

- [ ] I can submit a PR with the fix
- [ ] I can provide draft content for review
- [ ] I can help review proposed changes
- [ ] I need someone else to make this change

## Screenshots / Mockups

If applicable, add screenshots or mockups showing how the documentation should look.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation improvement here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have clearly identified the documentation issue
- [ ] I have specified the affected file/section
- [ ] I have explained why this is a problem
- [ ] I have proposed a solution or improvement
- [ ] I have considered who is affected by this issue
- [ ] I have searched for related documentation issues
